summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a stellar show featuring a soaring Scarlet Begonias jam, standout Sugar Magnolia and moving Stella Blue.
review: Both reviewers rave about the performance, calling it one of the best Sugar Magnolia shows ever and highlighting a cathartic, crescendo‑driven jam in Scarlet Begonias as well as a poignant Stella Blue. The recording is praised implicitly with no complaints, suggesting a clean, listenable soundboard source.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high 5‑star reviews emphasize exceptional musical moments and give no indication of recording flaws; with limited review count, confidence is medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific technical complaints; reviewers’ enthusiasm implies a clear, well‑balanced capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows smoothly, building from an expansive Scarlet Begonias jam into the uplifting Sugar Magnolia and closing with a poignant Stella Blue, delivering continuous emotional highs.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Reviewers note the band “catch up with Jerry,” praising his guitar work during the jam.
